attacking_style: Attacks decisively in final 4-8km of steep mountain finishes (8-14% gradients), often after sustained team tempo has depleted rivals. Prefers single sustained acceleration over repeated surges.
team_tactics: Relies heavily on domestique pacing through lower slopes (Kuss, Van Aert critical), then launches when isolated on steepest final ramps. Team sets extremely high tempo rather than early attacks.
terrain_preference: Excels on sustained steep gradients (8-14%) in final 5km and time trials with climbing. Struggles on explosive sub-1km finishes and extreme gradients (14%+) when fatigued.
vulnerability: Shows weakness on ultra-steep pitches (14%+) under fatigue and explosive accelerations under 1.5km. Early-season form (March) consistently inferior to peak rivals, particularly Pogačar.
key_patterns: Attacks in final 4-8km of climbs across 6+ observations, rarely goes earlier
Early season deficit to Pogačar evident across 3 Paris-Nice stages, losing 44s-1:39
Time trial ability significantly underestimated, won by 1:38-2:00 margins when peaked
Defensive climbing stronger than explosive: marks attacks comfortably but lacks devastating acceleration
Form peaks July-August; showed Vuelta fatigue cracks only after dual GT load
Requires elite domestique support; struggled when isolated despite maintaining gaps
form_trajectory: neutral: Dominated Tour 2023 with TT breakthrough, but Vuelta showed first fatigue cracks (Sept 5) before recovery. Dual GT load limits tested successfully overall.
